title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite Reproducibility Matrix

steps.expected: annotation.hdf5 plus public sample MP4 streams under data/sample/xperience-10m-sample
steps.boundary: raw sample data is downloaded from upstream, not redistributed here

steps.expected: minimal baseline metrics and model weights under results/min_*
12 task metrics, predictions, manifests, and neural_mlp task-head artifacts
steps.boundary: 8,378-d current feature contract; audio documented but not featurized

steps.expected: research-direction taxonomy, extension probes, and task walkthrough artifacts
steps.boundary: single-episode probes, not full research-direction solutions

steps.command: python scripts/generate_visualizations.py && python scripts/render_overview_figures.py && python scripts/render_task_suite_infographic.py && python scripts/export_modality_atlas_assets.py
steps.expected: website JSON bundles, charts, overview figures, task-suite infographic, and responsive modality atlas assets
steps.boundary: figures are generated presentation layers over committed metrics and sample thumbnails
checks public repo and prepared HF bundles only

steps.command: scripts/omni/discover_xperience10m_sources.py then scripts/omni/train_qwen3_omni_lora.py after 32 valid episodes exist
steps.expected: held-out episode LoRA pilot metrics after data gate passes
steps.boundary: blocked by gated full Xperience-10M access; no 32-episode metric is claimed
